caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. He wears a gold chain around his neck and a watch on his left wrist. Behind him, a white wall features the repeated text "GRIND HUSTLE" accompanied by gold stars. To the right, a screen displays a blurred image. On-screen graphics include a circular logo reading "BOSS TALK PODCAST" and a red and white text overlay that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, gesturing slightly with his hands while talking. His facial expression shifts as he speaks, and he looks slightly toward the side, maintaining a steady posture as the camera captures his conversation.
